jd_text: Who We Are Join BCG Platinion’s Enterprise Solutions team in the Riyadh office Middle east as an ERP Expert, leading high-impact digital transformation projects for major clients across the region. Boston Consulting Group partners with leaders in business and society to tackle their most important challenges and capture their greatest opportunities. BCG was the pioneer in business strategy when it was founded in 1963. Today, we help clients with total transformation-inspiring complex change, enabling organizations to grow, building competitive advantage, and driving bottom-line impact. To succeed, organizations must blend digital and human capabilities. Our diverse, global teams bring deep industry and functional expertise and a range of perspectives to spark change. BCG delivers solutions through leading-edge management consulting along with technology and design, corporate and digital ventures—and business purpose. We work in a uniquely collaborative model across the firm and throughout all levels of the client organization, generating results that allow our clients to thrive. About BCG Platinion BCG Platinion's presence spans across the globe, with offices in Asia, Europe, and South and North America. We achieve digital excellence for clients with sustained solutions to the most complex and time-sensitive challenge. We guide clients into the future to push the status quo, overcome tech limitations, and enable our clients to go further in their digital journeys than what has ever been possible in the past. At BCG Platinion, we deliver business value through the innovative use of technology at a rapid pace. We roll up our sleeves to transform business, revolutionize approaches, satisfy customers, and change the game through Architecture, Cybersecurity, Digital Transformation, Enterprise Application and Risk functions. We balance vision with a pragmatic path to change transforming strategies into leading-edge tech platforms, at scale. What You'll Do Support clients through end-to-end enterprise solutions transformation programs (covering CRM, ERP, HCM, SCM, Planning, Manufacturing), from their strategy such as business case and roadmap definition, business processes definition, technical reference architecture design, solutions and implementation partners selection, to implementation governance and quality assurance. Introduce "best practices" from business requirements specification to solution implementation, to minimize one-off customizations and reduce maintenance costs. Contribute to the enterprise solutions chapter at BCG Platinion by sharing your expertise (e.g., attend to the most relevant conferences and events, research and experiment with the latest tech including GenAI, author innovative articles) What You'll Bring Education: An above-average degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Business Administration or a related field (strong academic performance preferred) Experience: 3 to 4 years of relevant experience driving enterprise solutions transformation programs in CRM, ERP, HCM, SCM, Planning or Manufacturing (SAP S/4HANA preferred) Functional knowledge: Solid grasp of typical end-to-end business processes (e.g.,Procure-to-Pay, Order-to-Cash, Lead-to-Quote, Record-to-Report, Hire-to-Retire) and their implementation Technical knowledge: Familiarity with industry-specific solutions (e.g., SAP IS-OIL), addon (e.g., APO/IBP, Treasury/BCM, FSCM, Transportation Management, BPC/SEM) and analytical tools (e.g., SAP BW/BI, SAP Analytics Cloud, Digital Boardroom) Soft skills: Excellent teamwork, communication and presentation skills, eager to learn and improve, with intellectual agility and proven ability to align diverse stakeholders with a common goal, exceptional analytical and conceptual thinking abilities, strong client focus and results-driven approach Language: Fluency in English (Arabic skills are a strong plus) Who You'll Work With At BCG Platinion, we tackle our clients’ most critical IT challenges at the intersection of business and technology. We guide organizations through their ERP transformations such as the migration to SAP S/4HANA ahead of ECC’s end-of-life, a complex transformation that raises questions about business justification, tangible benefits and optimal roadmaps considering the implications on overall architecture and also alternative solutions and platforms. To meet this growing demand, we are expanding our Enterprise Solutions team. As a consultant affiliated with Enterprise Solution, you will work together with BCG technology and strategy experts on local and global projects, bridging their deep technical know-how with strategic insight. Partnering with clients, you will develop superior, business value driven ERP and application architecture strategies, concepts and roadmaps and apply your sound technical and functional process-related understanding to deliver high-impact outcomes. Most importantly, you will embody the BCG Platinion spirit by taking a hands-on, collaborative approach in solving though problems in an innovative manner. Additional info We guarantee constant development incentives in an open and rewarding work environment! Together with a dedicated team of talented colleagues, you get to work on new challenges every day. Individual training offers and a culture of open feedback will provide the framework needed to explore and perfect personal strengths. Our modern structures allow focusing on the essence of our work - with easy travel booking, excellent back-office support and comprehensive Knowledge Center. Boston Consulting Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable, and those with criminal histories will be considered in a manner consistent with applicable state and local laws. BCG is an E - Verify Employer. Click here for more information on E-Verify.
